items.title: Leaders pose for group photo at Ukraine war summit in London
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Britain on Sunday hosted a summit of European leaders to shore up support for Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy after an astonishing Oval Office blowout with President Donald Trump that left many uncertain where the once staunch allies stood.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Netanyahu says ceasefire in Gaza will only continue if Hamas keeps releasing hostages
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said on Sunday the ceasefire in Gaza would only continue if Hamas keeps releasing hostages, saying “there will be no free lunches.”

items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Some business owners see Miami Beach's restrictions on spring breakers as necessary to ensure safety, while others are concerned the rules could damage Miami Beach's status as a tourist destination. (AP Video/Cody Jackson) Read more here: https://bit.ly/3XnU7jI

items.title: The Kokama people in the Amazon perform rituals to aid Oscar nominated film
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Members of an Indigenous community in the Brazilian state of Amazonas performed a ritual on Friday in a bid to aid a film about an Indigenous rights advocate at this weekend's Oscars. With music and dance, a group from in Inhãa-be village, made up mostly of women, performed the War Ritual followed by the Victory Ritual, in a bid to help propel the movie "I’m Still Here" to success in the 97th Academy Awards on Sunday. (AP video by Fernando Crispim)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Mud-covered Carnival revelers, a strange sight in sleepy Brazilian town
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Several hundred mud-covered Carnival revelers paraded in the sleepy seaside town of Paraty in southeastern Brazil on Saturday, a decades-old tradition that has grown ever larger since its first edition nearly 40 years ago. (AP video shot by Maycron Abade and Thiago Mostazo) Read more here: https://bit.ly/4h3y7li

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Australian cricket legend Ricky Ponting shows his golfing skills
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Australian cricket legend Ricky Ponting showed his golfing skills with the flat stick when he drained a 40-foot birdie putt while playing as part of the Pro-Am at the New Zealand Open on Saturday. The former Aussie skipper, a scratch golfer who plays with a one-handicap, knocked down the long putt on the par-four 16th at Millbrook.

#rickyponding #golf #sports 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​</article>

items.title: Ukrainian soldiers reflect on Zelenskyy-Trump row in the Oval Office
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Fighting back against Russia's invasion without U.S. support will be "not just hard, but very hard," a Ukrainian soldier tells the Associated Press after Zelenskyy and Trump's public blowout. Read more here: https://bit.ly/4h3Arc0

items.title: LIVE: Outside the hospital where Pope Francis is being treated
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live outside Gemelli Hospital in Rome where Pope Francis is receiving treatment. The 88-year-old pope remained in stable condition on Saturday, a day after a respiratory crisis during his battle with double pneumonia, the Vatican said. Read more here: https://bit.ly/3DgQZzk

#popefrancis #pope #live</article>

items.title: Oscars 2025: LIVE from the red carpet
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live as stars arrive at the 2025 Oscars red carpet. Timothée Chalamet, Cynthia Erivo, Ariana Grande and Mikey Madison are among the 97th Academy Awards nominees and Conan O’Brien will be hosting the show.

#oscars #oscar2025 #live</article>

items.title: Uruguay's new leftist president Yamandú Orsi takes office
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Yamandú Orsi, a telegenic left-leaning former mayor and history teacher, has taken office as Uruguay’s new president. On Saturday in a swearing-in ceremony, he took the helm of a government that has pledged to strengthen the social safety net while reversing years of economic stagnation. (AP video by Diego Casal) Read more here: https://bit.ly/3QIwi2m

#uruguay #politics #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Blue Ghost moon landing LIVE: Firefly Aerospace spacecraft lands on the lunar surface
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live as Texas-based Firefly Aerospace’s lunar lander attempts to touch down on the moon more than a month after launching from Florida. The spacecraft Blue Ghost, named after a species of fireflies in the U.S., is carrying experiments for NASA. The lander standing 6 feet, 6 inches (2 meters) will attempt a touchdown at Mare Crisium on the near side of the moon no earlier than 3:34 am ET.

Credit: NASA
Image credit: Firefly Aerospace via AP

#moon #space #live</article>

items.title: LIVE: Muslims pray in Mecca as Ramadan begins in Saudi Arabia
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live from the Grand Mosque in Mecca where Muslims gather for prayers as Saudi Arabia began observing the holy month of Ramadan on Saturday along with many other countries in the world. The Grand Mosque houses the Kaaba, Islam’s holiest site. In some countries, Muslims will begin fasting on Sunday.

#ramadan #saudiarabia #live</article>
